data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. MR. BOJANGLES has his first outing without a trial but profiles nicely for this. Likely to be well fancied but watch market closely. 4. LOST YOURS TOO is an Andrew Paraskevas-trained newcomer by Mr. Audacious out of Targod Shirley. Start all important from the squeeze box. Market moves likely to signal ability but profiles strongly for this. 2. MRS. PUDDLEDUCK makes her debut without a trial but profiles well for first outing. Among the main hopes. 5. HOT SUSPECT is a Ian Garland-trained newcomer by Bernardo out of Auspicious Queen. No favours with the draw and will need to begin well. Expected to produce a bold debut.","runners":[4,5],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: HEALESVILLE-R1-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
